description: Natural Language Query skill - convert conversational queries to structured searches

evals.name: Basic Category Search
evals.prompt: Use the NLQ endpoint to find 'trading platform deals'
evals.expected_behavior: Should return deals in the 'trading' or 'finance' category
success_criteria: All deals have category related to trading/finance

evals.name: Reward Amount Filter
evals.prompt: Search for 'deals with signup bonus over $50'
evals.expected_behavior: Should filter deals with reward_value >= 50 and reward_type = 'cash' or 'credit'

evals.name: Platform Comparison
evals.expected_behavior: Should identify comparison intent and return both platforms

evals.name: Expiring Deals Query
evals.expected_behavior: Should filter deals with expiry within 7 days
success_criteria: WHERE clause includes expiry date filter
Returns only deals expiring within 7 days

evals.name: Complex Combined Query
evals.prompt: Find 'best crypto exchanges with signup bonus over $25 expiring this month'
evals.expected_behavior: Should combine category, reward, amount, and time filters

evals.name: MCP Tool Integration
evals.prompt: Call the MCP natural_language_query tool with query 'banking deals with high cash bonuses'
evals.expected_behavior: Should execute via MCP and return structured results

evals.name: Query Explanation
evals.expected_behavior: Should return explanation of how query was parsed

evals.name: AI-Powered Enhancement
evals.prompt: Query: 'better trading platforms than Robinhood with good reviews'
evals.expected_behavior: AI should enhance query to find alternatives and high trust deals
success_criteria: Sentiment filter for 'good' applied to trust score

evals.name: Error Handling
evals.prompt: Submit malformed request to /api/nlq with empty query

evals.name: Rate Limiting
evals.expected_behavior: Should allow 30 requests, then rate limit
